global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm stylized 3D animated children's picture-book short (Pixar/DreamWorks family CG, not live-action): soft practical lighting, gentle camera, playful dog energy that settles into cozy sleep. All humans match the same animated style as the dog -- never photoreal people. Faithful to rhyming VO; clear cause-and-effect bedtime routine; no slapstick cruelty. Keep Buster black-and-white coat locked every frame.

Character_Buster.description: Small black-and-white dog (never brown/tan redesign), compact playful build, bright curious eyes, floppy ears, short fur with clear black patches on white. Sweet, slightly goofy expression—not mean. Coat IS the black-and-white look (book text pajamas is coat metaphor unless art shows real sleepwear). ALWAYS wears his signature blue nightcap with yellow stars and a white pom-pom. Day and night: natural bare coat; tucks under quilts bare-furred.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Young playful dog energy if any non-verbal vocalizations; soft yips and happy pants only—no human speech. Same light, eager dog sound every scene.
Character_Buster.visual_lock: Always small black-and-white dog only—never brown, tan, gray, or solid-color redesign. Always signature blue star nightcap with white pom-pom (never bare-headed). Natural bare coat markings only—no physical pajama garment that blends into fur (text pajamas = coat pattern metaphor per book art). Never bipedal humanoid redesign.
wardrobe_always: blue star nightcap with white pom-pom

Character_Mom.description: Warm adult woman, mother figure, medium build, kind face, shoulder-length brown hair, soft blue cardigan over cream top, cream or soft beige pants, indoor house shoes. Calm bedtime energy; gentle hands. Stylized 3D animated picture-book design matching Buster's CG style, not photoreal.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult female, warm mid pitch, unhurried gentle pace, clear American storybook accent, patient loving energy. Same voice every scene.
Character_Mom.visual_lock: Stylized 3D animated character matching the dog's picture-book CG look (not photoreal, not live-action). Always soft blue cardigan and cream/beige pants; shoulder-length brown hair; kind adult face—never teen redesign. No name tags or printed personal names on clothing.

Character_Daddy.description: Adult man, father figure, medium build, short brown hair, soft plaid or solid sleep shirt, calm quiet presence in parents’ bed; mostly resting/background once Buster arrives. Stylized 3D animated picture-book design matching Buster's CG style, not photoreal.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult male, low-mid warm pitch, soft quiet energy if any line; mostly silent presence. Same voice every scene if he speaks.
Character_Daddy.visual_lock: Stylized 3D animated character matching the dog's picture-book CG look (not photoreal, not live-action). Always adult man with short brown hair in simple sleep shirt in parents’ bed; never teen redesign; no name badges.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storybook narrator only; never appears on camera.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult storyteller, medium pitch, playful rhyme-friendly cadence, gentle smile in the voice, clear diction for children. Same voice every scene.

Character_Dad.description: Stylized 3D animated adult man matching the dog's children's picture-book CG look — not photoreal. Medium build, short brown hair, calm kind face, relaxed bedtime presence. Soft gray sleep shirt or henley, dark lounge pants; mostly seen in or near the big bed.
Character_Dad.voice_profile: Adult man, warm medium-low pitch, quiet calm pace, soft American accent, low energy at bedtime; same voice every scene. Mostly silent presence unless a soft murmur is needed.
Character_Dad.visual_lock: Always soft gray sleep shirt and dark lounge pants; short brown hair; calm kind face. Stylized 3D animated adult matching Buster's CG look — never photoreal.

Loc_Buster_House.description: Cozy family home interior: living area near door, treat/water nook, carpeted stairs to upper floor. Soft evening home lighting, lived-in kid-and-dog friendly mess-free set.
Loc_Buster_House.visual_lock: Warm cream walls, soft evening lamps, front door visible for in/out beats, low treat dish area, carpeted staircase. No modern neon; picture-book cozy suburban home only.

Loc_Yard.description: Small evening backyard with bushes and grass where Buster potties; soft dusk/evening outdoor light.
Loc_Yard.visual_lock: Green bushes, grass patch, wooden fence or soft yard edge, evening blue-hour light. No busy street traffic; quiet suburban yard only.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Upstairs parents’ bedroom with large bed, soft bedding, nightstands, dim bedtime lamps—HOME SWEET HOME cozy.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Queen/king bed with soft duvet, warm bedside lamps, calm wall color, nightstand; never hospital or hotel redesign. Cozy home bedroom only.

global_production_variables.render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: stylized 3D animated children's picture-book CG (same render family as the cartoon dog) -- smooth animated materials, expressive non-photoreal faces; NOT live-action, NOT photoreal human photography
